BTC.reasoning: Momentum reading prevails: Extreme Fear has persisted while OI remains elevated and taker sell pressure stays dominant, indicating ongoing deleveraging not yet complete. Longs still crowded near 2. Volatility high so SL/TP widened accordingly.
